notes: Adds a separate Drop Off ON DUTY reason for intermodal port/yard drop-only events.
Drop Off requires only the equipment being dropped and does not require a new container, chassis, BOL, or going-to location.
Drop Off clears current intermodal equipment and closes the open route leg without touching driving events.
DOT document viewer and officer-safe package behavior are preserved.
label: v95.71 Intermodal drop-off only workflow
